title: HollowRealms - Dark Fantasy RPG
description: “A brutal dark fantasy survival experience where horror roams the night, ancient bosses guard forgotten dungeons, and the world itself conspires against you. Gather strength, master cursed magic, and survive in a realm born of blight and shadow.”
body:
Step into a world where hope is fleeting, the night is merciless, and every shadow hides a predator. This is a dark fantasy survival RPG modpack built to challenge your courage and immerse you in a realm of blight, ruin, and forgotten legends.

⚔️ Face Ancient Horrors
From the colossal monstrosities of L_Ender’s Cataclysm to the cursed guardians of Mowzie’s Mobs and Bosses of Mass Destruction, every battle will test your strength, skill, and preparation. Mutant creatures, parasites, and revenants stalk the land, turning even familiar biomes into deadly hunting grounds.

🏰 Explore Ruined Realms
The world is alive with danger and discovery. Delve into sprawling dungeons from When Dungeons Arise, uncover fortified keeps with YUNG’s Better Strongholds, and wander through cursed landscapes shaped by Terralith and Structory. Every journey offers mystery, loot, and death in equal measure.

🌑 Survive the Darkness
Survival is not guaranteed. Manage your body’s temperature with Cold Sweat, fight to stay alive with First Aid’s wound system, and struggle against hunger, thirst, and exhaustion. Nights are no longer safe—every decision matters, and one mistake may be your last.

✨ Forge Your Legend
Choose your fate with Origins and PlayerEX. Become a warrior, a cursed sorcerer, or something far darker. Harness forbidden spellcraft with Iron’s Spells n’ Spellbooks or sacrifice to eldritch powers with Occultism. The path you take defines your legend—but power always comes with a price.

🕯️ Immerse Yourself in Dread
With Presence Footsteps, AmbientSounds, and atmospheric shaders, every step through the forest feels haunted, every cave echoes with unseen horrors, and every ruined castle whispers of those who fell before you.

⚔️ This is not a peaceful journey. This is a world of ashes, rot, and shadow, where only the relentless endure. Gather your strength, sharpen your blade, and step into the darkness.

Will you survive the blight—or become part of it?
